# Fetch All Network IDs in a Meraki Organization (Python SDK)

## Objective
Automate the retrieval of all network IDs in your Meraki organization using the official Meraki Python SDK.

## Instructions
- Dynamically discover all organizations you have access to.
- Retrieve all networks in the organization and extract their network IDs.
- Display the list of network IDs in the output.

## Deliverables
- Python script ready to run in virtual environment
- Console output showing organization name and all network IDs with names
